features: EXCELLENT VALUE - Includes 40 individual birthday treat party bags measuring 12.5 x 28.5cm each and coordinating twist tie closures.
100% BOPP MATERIAL - Made from 100% BOPP plastic. The highest quality durable material, more flexible than traditional cellophane plastic, and perfect for keeping items fresh and secure inside.
LOVELY FOR GIFTING - Ideal for presenting and gifting cookies, biscuits, candy, sweets, fudge, toys,and much more.
STRONG QUALITY - Designed in the UK. The highest quality products, always with independent product safety accreditation.
VERSATILE TREAT BAGS - So many uses from gifting, birthdays, building block parties, bricks party favours and treat tables too
